tips_en: Start with S-Agent (Paper 1) for its architecturally novel agentic framework that reformulates spatial reasoning as iterative evidence accumulation, supported by strong zero-shot results surpassing GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3 Pro. It pairs naturally with MolmoMotion (Paper 2), which shares the VLM-based 3D spatial understanding theme but tackles dynamic motion forecasting—both release datasets and benchmarks that could inspire future work bridging spatial reasoning and motion prediction. Save Moebius (Paper 3) for a lighter read; though technically impressive with its 0.22B-parameter inpainting model, it targets a narrower efficiency problem orthogonal to the other two papers.
tips_zh: 建议先读 S-Agent（论文1），其智能体框架将空间推理重构为迭代式证据积累，架构新颖，且在零样本设置下超越了 GPT-5.4 和 Gemini 3 Pro，结果令人信服。它与 MolmoMotion（论文2）形成自然呼应——两者都以 VLM 为核心关注三维空间理解，但一个聚焦静态空间推理、一个聚焦动态运动预测，且都发布了数据集和基准，有望共同推动空间-运动联合建模的探索。Moebius（论文3）可以留到最后阅读，虽然 0.22B 参数的修复模型技术上令人惊艳，但聚焦的是与前两篇较为正交的模型效率问题。
